strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js
Deep expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators)
Proven track record in high-performance systems (e.g., millions of HTTP requests/sec, low-latency apps)
concerns: Primary stack alignment is strong, but secondary technologies (Kotlin/Java) are not prominently featured in recent roles
Limited explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or Kubernetes in recent work
Academic background includes non-traditional degrees (Photography/Video), though compensated by hands-on experience
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional full-stack proficiency with TypeScript/Node.js and React, including recent AI-agent work, which aligns strongly with the role's primary stack and AI agent development requirement. His experience with high-performance systems and test-driven development is highly valuable. However, the resume lacks recent evidence of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) or Kubernetes usage, which are core secondary technologies for the role.
